query: Loomal complaints OR frustrating OR broken

results.title: Loom is rated "Bad" with 1.4 / 5 on Trustpilot
results.content:
Looking at 113 reviews, most reviewers were let down by their experience overall. Many people reported that the application frequently crashes, is slow, and suffers from numerous bugs that hinder its functionality and waste significant time. Customers also found the user experience frustrating, with issues like videos not loading, audio being out of sync, or recordings failing to save properly. Th e login process and account management were particularly problematic, often leading to users being locked out or struggling with workspace settings. Reviewers also expressed dissatisfaction with the subscription and payment aspects, citing billing discrepancies, difficulty in canceling accounts, and a lack of flexibility regarding renewals. Conversely, a small portion of people felt that the [...] Loom may be a useful product, but the billing and support experience has been very frustrating. If a customer pays for a month, they should either keep access until the end of the paid period or receive a clear refund option. At the very least, contacting customer service should not be this complicated.

June 22, 2026

results.title: Loomal.ai - The agentic commerce payment company
results.content: ♻️ Repost if your agents deserve their own identity — not yours. [Likes: 634, Comments: 62]; Loomal.ai (1mo): We're live on Product Hunt today 🚀 Loomal is identity infrastructure for AI agents. The problem we kept running into: AI agents today operate by borrowing human credentials. They use your email to send messages, your API keys to hit services, your phone for 2FA. It works until it doesn't — and when it doesn't, there's no record of which agent did what, authorized by whom. Loomal gives every agent its own: – Email – Password Manager – 2FA – A cryptographic delegation chain back to the human who created it This is the foundation layer we believe agent infrastructure is missing. Not a wrapper. Not a proxy. Real identity, per agent, with accountability built in. If this resonates, [...] Loomal.ai (1mo): This Friday at SQ Collective, 1.30pm — We are walking through the identity problem with AI agents. Agents today run on borrowed credentials and shared inboxes. There’s no way to know who did what. Loomal fixes that. Each agent gets its own email, credential vault, and 2FA through one API.  [Likes: 0, Comments: 0]; Anuj J. (1mo): The "Ghost" Your AI Never Knew It Needed. Your AI has a billion parameters but zero friends. And definitely no ID. We keep giving our agents borrowed wallets and fake names. Then we wonder why they fail at basic tasks like verifying an email or logging into Stripe. It’s like asking a CEO to close a deal wearing a paper bag over their head. Anonymous. Risky. Unprofessional. Until 30 seconds ago. Meet Loomal.ai (Live now). It doesn't just give your [...] ## Posts

results.title: Loomal: Monetize any MCP server in 5 minutes with no % skim. | Product Hunt
results.content:
### What does "Agent-Native Infrastructure" actually look like?

View all

Reviews

No reviews yetBe the first to leave a review for Loomal

Wispr Flow: Dictation That Works Everywhere

Wispr Flow: Dictation That Works EverywhereStop typing. Start speaking. 4x faster.

Promoted

Danny Heng

Loomal

Loomal

Maker

📌

👋 Hey Product Hunt!

I'm Danny, maker of Loomal.

🤖 AI agents are starting to buy things. They research, compare, and complete purchases on their own.

⚠️ But here's the problem. Almost nothing online can sell to them.

Stores and APIs are built for humans. Browsers. Credit cards. Checkout forms.

Agents don't have those. They have wallets. 👛

So we have this strange moment:

millions of agents with spending power, and an internet that can't take their money. 💸 [...] Report

Danny Heng

Loomal

Loomal

Maker

@nuseir\_yassin1 The scale part of your question is actually the interesting bit, Nuseir. Thousands of agents buying simultaneously sounds scary until you remember every one of them is legible. Signed identity, wallet history, spend caps. Compare that to card fraud where the whole game is guessing whether a human is who they claim. Volume was the enemy in card fraud because review was manual. Here the checks are per transaction and automatic, so scale doesn't dilute them. Honestly the anonymous human with a stolen card was always the harder problem.

Report

123 [...] Report

Aparna Rajesh

🧐 Good find

@dannyheng Everyone's asking about payments, but the part I don't get is discovery. Say I list my API on the Index today — how does an agent actually find it? Is there something agents query programmatically, or are we still waiting for a human to paste a URL into a prompt?

Report

Danny Heng

Loomal

Loomal

Maker

@aparna\_rajesh This is the underrated half of the product, glad someone asked 😄

The Index is machine-readable end to end — agents query it programmatically: search by capability, compare prices, read the schema, and pay, all in one flow with no human pasting URLs. Discovery, evaluation, and purchase are the same session.

results.title: Loomal — Identity for AI Agents
results.content:

Compliance

FINRA · 2024 · fine

$1.1B

in fines to 16 firms for communication attribution failures.

HIPAA mandates unique identification for every system touching patient data. CMMC blocks DoD contracts without it. The pattern is the same everywhere: if an AI agent acts, someone needs to prove who authorized it.

See how Loomal satisfies each regulation

Finance

FINRA · SEC · SOX

Healthcare

HIPAA · Part 11

Legal

FRCP · FRE 502

Defense

CMMC · NIST 800-171

Insurance

UCSPA · RESPA

Delegation chain

## Every action traces back to the human who authorized it.

Human > Org > Agent > Action. Cryptographically verifiable via DKIM. Revoke the human and every agent stops. No orphaned access. No cleanup scripts.

Human [...] LOOMALLOOMAL

Get API Key

Identity for AI Agents

# AI agents haveno Give yours one.

Everything a human has online — now callable from one API. DKIM-signed email. AES-256-GCM vault. MCP-native.

Get API Key →

Read Docs

create identity

live · looping

The problem

## Today, agents operate with borrowed identities & hardcoded secrets.

01

01still common

No email

Agents use your Gmail or dump messages to a queue. No real address, no threading, no DKIM.

from = "you@gmail.com" // your identity, not agent's

02

02still common

No credentials

API keys in .env files. No rotation, no 2FA, no vault. One leaked key breaks everything.

STRIPE\_KEY=sk\_live\_•••• // committed to .env

03

03still common

No accountability [...] 03

03still common

No accountability

No delegation chain. No way to trace an agent's action back to the human who authorized it.

authorized\_by = null // who sent this?

The identity stack · Human → Agent

## Agents are the new users. They need identity.

Humans need an email, a password manager, and a phone for 2FA to do anything meaningful online. AI agents need the same primitives — plus delegation chains and audit trails that trace every action back to the human who authorized it.

Human

3 primitives

Email address

@gmail · @outlook · @company

Password manager

1Password · Bitwarden · Keychain

Phone for 2FA

SMS · Authenticator app

becomes

becomes

Agent (Loomal)

5 primitives

Inbox

DKIM-signed · threaded · per-agent

Vault

AES-256-GCM · scoped · audit-logged

TOTP
